title: pelargonium × calliston
intro: Pelargonium × calliston, also known as the Rose Geranium or Pelargonium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Pelargonium × calliston include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and relieving menstrual cramps, among others. The plant is typically prepared for consumption in the form of tea, tinctures, or essential oils, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
